title: Ender Pouch
description: A lightweight mod adding a portable Ender Chest access item with immersive effects and vanilla-friendly crafting.
body:
Ender Pouch is a lightweight, standalone tool designed to help you access your Ender Chest inventory effortlessly while on the move. With a simple right-click, you can tap into your dimensional storage anywhere, anytime. This mod contains only one item — the Ender Pouch — keeping it simple and easy to use. ## Features - **Instant Ender Access**: Right-click to open your Ender Chest inventory, no matter where you are. - **Immersive Effects**: Enjoy custom particle and sound effects when opening and closing the pouch. - **Inventory Protection**: Prevents the Ender Pouch from being placed inside an Ender Chest. - **Unique Advancement**: Unlock the "Pocket Dimension" advancement upon crafting. - **Thematic Crafting**: A balanced recipe that fits naturally into Minecraft's progression. ## How it Works ### Opening the Pouch Right-Click while holding the Ender Pouch to instantly open your Ender Chest inventory. ### While the GUI is Open Faint Witch/Entity Effect particles will rise slowly around you, indicating the dimensional connection is active. ### Closing the Pouch Simply close the inventory screen (usually by pressing Esc or your inventory key). ## Crafting the Pouch Craft the Ender Pouch by surrounding an Ender Chest with a string and 7 pieces of Leather:
[ L ] [ S ] [ L ]
[ L ] [ E ] [ L ]
[ L ] [ L ] [ L ]
Where: L = Leather, S = String, E = Ender Chest ## FAQ **Q: What does this mod add?** A: This mod adds only one item: the Ender Pouch. No other items, blocks, or entities. **Q: How do I open the Ender Chest?** A: Just right-click while holding the Ender Pouch in your hand. **Q: Does the Ender Pouch have durability?** A: No, the Ender Pouch has unlimited uses and does not have durability. **Q: Can I put an Ender Pouch inside an Ender Chest?** A: No, the mod prevents this to avoid issues. You will receive a message if you try. **Q: Can I use this in my modpack?** A: Absolutely. This mod can be freely used in any modpack. No need to ask permission (though credit is always appreciated!). ## Mod Compatibility - Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer (SMP). - Should be compatible with most inventory mods (though report any issues you find!). ## Support Found a bug or have a suggestion? Feel free to leave a comment. Feedback is always welcome and helps improve the mod!
